narration: We keep a min-heap that stores only the current best 3 large values.
callout: The smallest of the current top 3 sits on top.

narration: When 12 arrives, the heap becomes too big. We remove 1, the weakest of the current best 4 values.
decision: If heap size goes past k, pop the smallest survivor.

narration: Later 11 arrives, so 3 gets removed and the heap ends with 5, 11, and 12.
callout: Only the k largest numbers survive.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why do we want the weakest of the current best values easy to remove?
